tipRules.tip: KVD: Clear water = natural colors on the Thunder Cricket. Green pumpkin or blue craw body with KVD Magic trailer (bite the head off to shorten). Imitates bluegill and crayfish — looks natural to the bass. Cover water and get it in the zone.

knowledge.insight: KVD: Bite the head off the KVD Magic trailer — shorten it just a bit. Combined with blue craw Thunder Cricket, it looks like a bluegill. The trailer adds a little flash and keeps the presentation subtle and natural for clear water.
KVD: CC5 composite rod with heavy action (e-glass/graphite blend) — you feel everything with the bladed jig and it absorbs shock on the bite. 7.5:1 KVD reel, 20lb fluorocarbon.
